ns0:entry.ns0:title: HigherOrderCO/Bend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HigherOrderCO/Bend
Language: rust
A massively parallel, high-level programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
Language: rust
Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ai-dynamo/dynamo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ai-dynamo/dynamo
Language: rust
A Datacenter Scale Distributed Inference Serving Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astral-sh/uv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astral-sh/uv
Language: rust
An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
Language: rust
A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foundry-rs/foundry
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry
Language: rust
Foundry is a blazing fast, portable and modular toolkit for Ethereum application development written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ai-project/git-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ai-project/git-ai
Language: rust
A Git extension for tracking the AI-generated code in your repos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: longbridge/gpui-component
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/longbridge/gpui-component
Language: rust
Rust GUI components for building fantastic cross-platform desktop application by using GPUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/windows-rs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/windows-rs
Language: rust
Rust for Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ogulcancelik/herdr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openfootmanager/openfootmanager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openfootmanager/openfootmanager
Language: rust
An open source soccer/football manager game

ns0:entry.ns0:title: quickwit-oss/tantivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/quickwit-oss/tantivy
Language: rust
Tantivy is a full-text search engine library inspired by Apache Lucene and written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: t8y2/dbx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/t8y2/dbx
Language: rust
20MB, lightweight, cross-platform database client. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse, SQL Server and more.20MB，轻量级跨平台数据库客户端、数据库管理工具。支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite、Redis、MongoDB、DuckDB、ClickHouse、SQL Server 等。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman
Language: rust
Your Personal AI super intelligence. A brain that builds a local-first memory of your life, a fantastic orchestrator of agent fleets and workflows, and a deep researcher.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open-source desktop app for downloading, organizing and studying media. Native cross-platform (Tauri + Rust + Svelte). PDF/EPUB reader with focus mode, timestamped notes and spaced repetition. Media downloads via yt-dlp (1.800+ sites). Extensible plugin system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/agent-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser
Language: rust
Browser automation CLI for AI agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: rust
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.
